children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for each fiscal year such sums as may be necessary to carry out this chapter.

children.heading: Modernization and improvement of international trade technology systems and data collection
children.label: c Modernization and improvement of international trade technology systems and data collection

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall establish a new system or modify an existing data collection and organization system to collect and organize in a single system quantitative data on imports of each organically produced agricultural product accepted into the United States.

children.heading: Activities
children.label: 2 Activities
children.text: In carrying out paragraph (1), the Secretary shall modernize trade and transaction certificates to ensure full traceability to the port of entry without unduly hindering trade or commerce, such as through an electronic trade document exchange system.

children.label: A
children.text: inspection of imports of agricultural products;

children.label: B
children.text: trade data collection and organization; or

children.label: C
children.text: enforcement of trade requirements for organically produced agricultural products.

children.label: B
children.text: maintaining the database and technology upgrades previously carried out under this subsection, as in effect on the day before .December 20, 2018

children.heading: Availability
children.label: 5 Availability
children.text: The amounts made available under paragraph (4) are in addition to any other funds made available for the purposes described in that paragraph and shall remain available until expended.
